description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a long, straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade is a pale, almost ivory color, and features a geometric, gold-colored design near the base, adding a decorative touch. The crossguard is wide and angular, rendered in a muted gold or brass tone, providing both protection and visual contrast. The handle is dark, likely black or deep blue, and appears cylindrical with a subtle taper, ending in a rounded pommel. The overall design is clean and symmetrical, with a blend of functional and ornamental elements. This sword would stand out as a ceremonial or fantasy weapon in an urban display or themed environment.
description: A stylized, straight-bladed sword with a pale blade, gold geometric accents, a wide crossguard, and a dark cylindrical handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the pale blade, gold geometric design at the base, and the wide crossguard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the rectangular profile of the handle and crossguard.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same blade and guard details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim blade and the handle's cylindrical shape.
attribute_ornamentation: gold geometric design at blade base
